# Generated by ollama (llama3.1)
# Prompt: Create an ARM template for Azure resources that use service endpoints for connectivity. Enable service endpoints for Storage and SQL on our VNet but allow public access as fallback. This provides flexibility for accessing resources from both Azure and on-premises during migration.
# Category: cloud_network_security

resources:
  - type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks
    apiVersion: 2019-11-01
    name: exampleVnet
    location: West US
    properties:
      addressSpace:
        addressPrefixes:
          - 10.0.0.0/16
      subnets:
        - name: default
          properties:
            serviceEndpoints:
              - Microsoft.Storage
              - Microsoft.Sql
          addressRange: 10.0.1.0/24

  - type: Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks/subnets
    apiVersion: 2019-11-01
    name: exampleVnet/default
    properties:
      serviceEndpoints:
        - Microsoft.Storage
        - Microsoft.Sql
      addressRange: 10.0.1.0/24

  - type: Microsoft.Network/serviceEndpointPolicies
    apiVersion: 2019-06-01
    name: allowPublicFallback
    location: West US
    properties:
      serviceEndpointPolicyRules:
        - id: sqlrule
          description: Allow public fallback for SQL
          protocols:
            - '*'  
          service: Microsoft.Sql 
          targetSubnets:
            - exampleVnet/default

  - type: Microsoft.Network/serviceEndpointPolicies/serviceEndpointPolicyRule
    apiVersion: 2019-06-01
    name: storagerule
    location: West US
    properties:
      description: Allow public fallback for Storage
      protocols:
        - '*'  
      service: Microsoft.Storage 
      targetSubnets:
        - exampleVnet/default

outputs:
  vNetId:
    value: '[resourceId('Microsoft.Network/virtualNetworks', 'exampleVnet')]'
